title: AOP-Wiki RDF Dashboard
description: Flask + Plotly dashboard for the multi-version AOP-Wiki RDF endpoint. It visualises how the AOP-Wiki has evolved across quarterly snapshots (entity counts, annotation completeness, ontology usage, network structure), with every plot exposing its SPARQL query and offering CSV/PNG/SVG export. Live: aopwiki-dashboard.vhp4safety.nl. Backed by the versioned SPARQL endpoint aopwiki-multirdf.vhp4safety.nl/sparql. Conversion method: doi.org/10.1089/aivt.2021.0010; dataset: 10.5281/zenodo.13353286.
